originalTitle: Live Dev - PufferLib is Fixing Reinforcement Learning
title: Implementing Phasic Policy Gradient Value Function Training in PufferLib
summary: Implemented PPG-style auxiliary value function training with policy cloning in PufferLib. Debugged issues with KL loss and optimizer, found that tuning value function coefficient can replicate PPG benefits, and tested state-based skill discrimination for diversity is all you need.
